title: WinterBurn
description:
This Mod adds many snow themed elements to your game!

Made with MC Creator
body:
A Mod that adds many snow themed Blocks, Mobs, Structures and Weapons!

Mod includes:

- Frost Brick set

- (Frostbit) Mob that spawns in the snowy plains

- (Frost Fortress) A Structure that spawns in the snowy plains

- (Frost Sword) A sword made of ice, very strong

Many more to come soon!

Please leave suggestions in the Discord to help further improve on this mod

Also if there is any issues please put your issue in the Bug Tracker

Thank you!
